title: Frontend Engineer (Mid-Level)
description:
We are seeking a mid-level Frontend Engineer to join our team. As a Frontend Engineer, you will be responsible for developing high-quality, responsive, and user-friendly web applications.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement responsive web applications using Vue.js and JavaScript/TypeScript
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop and maintain large-scale web applications
- Troubleshoot and debug issues using browser development tools and debugging techniques
- Implement CSS preprocessing and responsive web design principles
- Work closely with designers to translate designs into functional and visually appealing web applications
- Participate in agile methodologies and CI/CD pipelines

Must-have skills:
- JavaScript
- TypeScript
- Vue.js
- Responsive Web Design
- CSS Preprocessing
- Debugging
- Agile Methodologies
- Web Development

Nice to have:
- jQuery
- Browser Development
- CI/CD
